One of the Taken.name: Один из Похищенных
Знак Орзова, цепь длиной в фут из десяти золотых монет, облачение, комплект {@item fine clothes|phb|отличной одежды} и поясной {@item pouch|phb|кошель} с 1 пз (монета в 10 зино орзовской чеканки)
Вы можете оказывать давление на одного или нескольких человек, стоящих ниже вас в иерархии гильдии, и требовать их помощи по мере необходимости. Например, вы можете велеть доставить послание через весь квартал, бесплатно прокатиться в карете или поручить другим прибрать кровавое месиво, что вы оставили в переулке. Мастер решает, разумны ли ваши требования и есть ли поблизости подчинённые, способные их исполнить. По мере роста вашего положения в гильдии вы получаете влияние над всё большим числом людей, в том числе и над теми, кто облечён большей властью.
Orzhov Representative.entries.1.name: Умение: Рычаг влияния
{@i Требование: Использование заклинаний или Магия договора}

Для вас заклинания из таблицы «Заклинания гильдии Орзов» добавляются в список заклинаний вашего заклинательного класса. (Если вы мультиклассовый персонаж с несколькими списками заклинаний, эти заклинания добавляются во все из них.)
{@spell enthrall}, {@spell ray of enfeeblement}, {@spell zone of truth}
{@spell bestow curse}, {@spell speak with dead}, {@spell spirit guardians}
{@spell blight}, {@spell death ward}, {@spell Leomund's secret chest}

Ваша магия обычно проявляется в виде клубящихся теней, ослепительного света, а порой и мимолётно являющихся призрачных духов. Ваши заклинания могут пускать кровь врагам или даже напрямую касаться их душ.
Orzhov Representative.entries.2.name: Заклинания гильдии Орзов
Члены Синдиката Орзова — это и упадочная знать на вершине олигархии, и погрязшие в долгах бедолаги у самого её основания. Вы находитесь где-то между этими крайностями, а потому можете держаться как с высокомерием богача, так и со смирением бедняка.
Черты характера
d8
Черта характера
Я всегда готов действовать сообразно предложенному денежному вознаграждению.
Долги не для того, чтобы их прощать.
Я привык наслаждаться лучшими удовольствиями, какие можно купить за деньги.
Никто не усомнится, что я на голову выше толп жалких крестьян, что кишат в городе.
Я терпеть не могу потратить хоть на зиб больше, чем нужно, на необходимую покупку.
Я терпеть не могу, когда серьёзное дело пытаются обратить в шутку.
Я хочу, чтобы все знали, насколько я богат, могуществен и важен.
Мне не на что надеяться в будущем.
Идеалы
d6
Идеал
{@b Гильдия}. Только моя гильдия и важна по-настоящему. (Любое)
{@b Богатство}. Я сделаю всё, чтобы стать таким же богатым, как олигархи. (Злое)
{@b Власть}. Однажды приказы буду отдавать я. (Злое)
{@b Престиж}. Я хочу, чтобы мной восхищались, меня уважали, боялись или даже ненавидели за моё положение и богатство. (Злое)
{@b Стабильность}. Экономика работает лучше всего, когда хаос держат в узде, а каждый знает своё место. (Законопослушное)
{@b Вечность}. Я хочу жить вечно — во плоти, пока это возможно, а затем в облике духа. (Любое)
Привязанности
d6
Привязанность
Невыносимое бремя долга довело меня до отчаяния.
Я обязан повиноваться велениям предка, заседающего в Призрачном Совете.
Своё имущество я ценю выше собственной смертной жизни.
Один олигарх публично унизил меня, и я отомщу всему его семейству.
Моя вера в Обзедат непоколебима.
Я хочу доказать, что достойнее старшего брата (или сестры), и тем самым обеспечить себе большую долю в наследстве родителей.
Слабости
d6
Слабость/Недостаток
Я храню скандальную тайну, что может навеки погубить мою семью, — но может и снискать мне расположение Призрачного Совета.
Я убеждён, что все мои знакомые строят против меня козни.
Я пойду на любой риск, если денежная награда достаточно велика.
Я убеждён, что куда важнее, чем готовы признать остальные.
Я не слишком уважаю тех, кто небогат.
Я не упущу случая обокрасть тех, кто богаче меня, пусть даже ради никчёмных безделушек.
Orzhov Representative.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Синдикат Орзова действует по строгой иерархии, выстроенной на сети связей между старыми богатыми семьями. Ваша семья может обеспечить важные знакомства, а её занятия преступностью, банковским делом или взысканием долгов могут связать вас с членами других гильдий.
Бросьте дважды по таблице «Связи в Орзове» (для союзника и для соперника) и один раз по таблице «Связи вне Орзова».
Связи в Орзове
d8
Контакт
Дух одного из предков проявил ко мне интерес.
Мой старший двоюродный родственник вхож к влиятельному олигарху.
Я знаю рыцаря, что отвечает за взыскание долгов с влиятельных особ.
Вампир-понтифик некогда пытался использовать меня как пешку в своих интригах.
Безмолвный дух повсюду следует за мной.
У моего брата (или сестры) есть ключи от некоторых помещений Банка Визкопа.
Один великан считает меня очаровательным.
Я регулярно подношу дары одному ангелу, и тот в ответ благоволит мне.
Связи вне Орзова
Контакт
Арестор Азориуса вечно сует нос в деловые сделки моей семьи.
Паладин Бороса спас мне жизнь — к моему вечному стыду.
Я знаю лавочника, что втайне служит агентом Димира и следит, чтобы я держал эту тайну при себе.
Меня завораживает культура краулов Голгари, и я подружился с одним из их жрецов смерти.
Друид Груула меня ненавидит, но никогда не посмеет меня тронуть.
Я знаю инженера Иззета, что отчаянно пытается выплатить долг, оставшийся от покойного родственника.
Бросьте ещё раз для дополнительной связи в Орзове; вы сами решаете, союзник это или соперник.
Мой друг детства теперь мучитель Ракдоса. Мы до сих пор иногда встречаемся за выпивкой.
У меня есть ключ от хранилища, где друид Селезнии прячет предмет своего постыдного секрета.
Я состоял в браке с биоинженером Симиков.
Orzhov Representative.entries.4.name: Контакты
Устройство Синдиката Орзова таково, что вы всегда исполняете волю кого-то, кто стоит на ступень выше вас. В конечном счёте вашу роль в гильдии определяют те люди (и духи), что стоят над вами.

Большую часть своего пути вы, скорее всего, будете заняты той или иной стороной повседневных преступных дел гильдии. Это может означать, что вы давите своим влиянием, навязывая волю гильдии, или используете религиозную власть, чтобы вымогать подношения у народа. Но это может означать и выполнение разных поручений начальства — от доставки посланий до заказных убийств.
Orzhov Representative.entries.5.name: Какова моя роль?
Orzhov Representative.name: Представитель Орзова
Outlander.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Outlander.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Outlander.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Outlander.entries.0.items.3.entry: {@item staff|phb|посох}, {@item hunting trap|phb|охотничий капкан}, трофей с убитого вами зверя, {@item traveler's clothes|phb|дорожная одежда} и поясной {@item pouch|phb|кошель} с 10 зм
Outlander.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Outlander.entries.1.entries.0: У вас отличная память на карты и географию, и вы всегда можете припомнить общее расположение местности, поселений и прочих ориентиров вокруг вас. Кроме того, каждый день вы можете добыть пищу и пресную воду для себя и ещё пятерых, если земля даёт ягоды, мелкую дичь, воду и тому подобное.
Outlander.entries.1.name: Умение: Странник
Outlander.entries.2.entries.0: Вы побывали в странных местах и видели то, что другим даже не вообразить. Подумайте о некоторых из дальних земель, где вы побывали, и о том, как они на вас повлияли. Вы можете бросить по таблице ниже, чтобы определить ваше занятие во время жизни в дикой местности, или выбрать то, что лучше подходит вашему персонажу.
Outlander.entries.2.name: Специальность
Outlander.entries.3.entries.0: Среди цивилизованного люда чужеземцев часто считают грубыми и неотёсанными; они мало почитают тонкости городской жизни. Узы племени, клана, семьи и природного мира, частью которого они являются, — самые важные привязанности для большинства чужеземцев.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.0.1: Мной движет жажда странствий, что увела меня из дома.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.1.1: Я опекаю своих друзей, словно выводок новорождённых щенят.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.2.1: Однажды я пробежал двадцать пять миль без остановки, чтобы предупредить свой клан о приближении орочьей орды. Я сделал бы это снова, если бы потребовалось.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.3.1: У меня есть урок на любой случай, почерпнутый из наблюдений за природой.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.4.1: Я ни в грош не ставлю богатых или благовоспитанных людей. Деньги и манеры не спасут тебя от голодного совомедведя.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.5.1: Я вечно что-нибудь беру в руки, рассеянно вожусь с этим и порой случайно ломаю.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.1.rows.6.1: Среди животных мне куда уютнее, чем среди людей.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.2.rows.0.1: Перемены. Жизнь подобна временам года — она в постоянном движении, и мы должны меняться вместе с ней. (Хаотичное)
Outlander.entries.3.entries.2.rows.1.1: Высшее благо. Долг каждого — приносить как можно больше счастья всему племени. (Доброе)
Outlander.entries.3.entries.2.rows.2.1: Честь. Опозорив себя, я позорю весь свой клан. (Законопослушное)
Outlander.entries.3.entries.2.rows.4.1: Природа. Природный мир важнее всех порождений цивилизации. (Нейтральное)
Outlander.entries.3.entries.2.rows.5.1: Слава. Я должен снискать славу в битве — для себя и своего клана. (Любое)
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.0.1: Моя семья, клан или племя — самое важное в моей жизни, даже когда они далеко от меня.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.1.1: Урон нетронутой дикой природе моего дома — это урон мне самому.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.2.1: Я обрушу страшную кару на злодеев, уничтоживших мою родину.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.3.1: Я последний из своего племени, и лишь от меня зависит, войдут ли их имена в легенды.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.4.1: Меня терзают ужасные видения грядущей катастрофы, и я пойду на всё, чтобы её предотвратить.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.3.rows.5.1: Мой долг — родить детей, чтобы продолжить моё племя.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.0.1: Я слишком пристрастен к элю, вину и прочим хмельным напиткам.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.1.1: В жизни, прожитой на полную, нет места осторожности.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.2.1: Я помню каждое нанесённое мне оскорбление и втайне затаиваю обиду на всякого, кто когда-либо причинил мне зло.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.3.1: Я с трудом проникаюсь доверием к представителям других рас, племён и обществ.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.4.1: Насилие — мой ответ почти на любой вызов.
Outlander.entries.3.entries.4.rows.5.1: Не ждите, что я стану спасать тех, кто не может спасти себя сам. Таков закон природы: сильные процветают, а слабые гибнут.
Outlander.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Outlander.name: Чужеземец
Phlan Insurgent.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Phlan Insurgent.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Phlan Insurgent.entries.0.items.2.entry: {@item caltrops (bag of 20)|phb|мешочек чеснока (20 шт.)}, небольшая {@item trinket|phb|безделушка}, что связывает вас с жизнью, которую вы вели до оккупации Флана, {@item healer's kit|phb|набор целителя}, тёмная {@item common clothes|phb|простая одежда}, включающая плащ с капюшоном, и поясной {@item pouch|phb|кошель} с 5 зм
Phlan Insurgent.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Phlan Insurgent.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Phlan Insurgent.entries.2.entries.0: Захват Флана Воргансараксом ясно стоит у вас перед глазами. Вы занимались своими повседневными делами, когда силы зелёного дракона хлынули из канализации и обрушились на ваш дом. Многих жителей Флана, и старых, и молодых, захватили в плен, убили или принесли в дань Увечной Злобе. Вы и сами оказались среди пленённых. Но — то ли с помощью искателей приключений, то ли благодаря собственной смекалке и несгибаемой решимости — вы сбежали.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.2.entries.1: Вместо того чтобы бежать из края, вы решили остаться и сражаться. Найдя убежище за пределами города и окружающей его смертоносной чащи, вы наносите удары по Слёзам Злобы и их чудовищным союзникам. Вы научились выживать в тяжелейших, отчаянных условиях, когда припасы на исходе, а подкрепление неизвестно когда придёт. Вы привыкли действовать под покровом ночи, нанося посильный урон, чтобы отомстить за друзей и родных, которых потеряли в ныне оккупированном Флане. Вы изгоните Воргансаракса — или погибнете, пытаясь это сделать.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.2.name: Обзор
Phlan Insurgent.entries.3.entries.0: Оторванный от прежней городской жизни, вы приспособились к суровому существованию в дикой местности вокруг Флана. Ремесло, которым вы занимались, до сих пор определяет ваш взгляд на вещи, манеру действовать в разных ситуациях и то, как вы помогаете движению сопротивления против Увечной Злобы. Вы можете бросить по приведённой ниже таблице, чтобы определить, чем вы занимались до падения города, или выбрать то, что лучше всего подходит вашему персонажу (выбирайте либо из общего столбца, либо из конкретного, но не из обоих).
Phlan Insurgent.entries.3.name: Происхождение
Phlan Insurgent.entries.4.entries.0: Вы изучили окрестные леса, ручьи, пещеры и другие природные укрытия, где можно затаиться — или устроить засаду. Вы умеете быстро оценивать местность в поисках выгодных особенностей. Кроме того, вы можете отыскать в окружающей природе материалы и наскоро смастерить из них простые припасы (например, самодельные факелы, верёвку, лоскуты ткани и т. п.), которые расходуются после использования. Примечание: это умение — вариант умения предыстории «Чужеземец».
Phlan Insurgent.entries.4.name: Умение: Партизан
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.entries.0: Вы оставили жизнь, которую вели как житель Флана. Но вторжение Увечной Злобы отзывается глубоко внутри вас. Возможно, нескольким друзьям или родным удалось бежать вместе с вами. А может, все, кто был вам дорог, погибли или пропали без вести во время падения города. Возможно, вам известно о ком-то, кто вопреки всему выживает в чаще, и вы жаждете вырвать его из полной опасностей жизни в городе.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.entries.1.rows: Моему терпению нет предела, пока цель в поле зрения.
И в жизни, и в борьбе цель оправдывает мои поступки.
Если ты мне не помогаешь, то хотя бы не путайся под ногами.
Я тоскую по жизни, которую у меня отняли.
Друзья и родные трагически погибли у меня на глазах. Надеюсь, мне больше никогда не придётся пережить такое.
Для меня важно делать в жизни правильный выбор. Мой выбор может спасти не только мою жизнь, но и жизни других.
Я никогда не позволю врагам застать меня врасплох.
Время — драгоценный ресурс, и тратить его нужно с умом.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.entries.2.rows: Лидерство. Угнетённым нужен тот, кто вдохновит их на смелые поступки. (Доброе)
Непредсказуемость. Держать врага в неведении и выводить из равновесия — моя тактическая сила. (Хаотичное)
Решимость. Угрозы моему дому должны быть устранены любой ценой. (Любое)
Свобода. Те, кого поработили и несправедливо заточили, достойны моей помощи. (Доброе)
Находчивость. В трудные времена наша смекалка — самый ценный ресурс. (Любое)
Единство. Действуя сообща, мы преодолеем любые преграды, даже самые непреодолимые на вид. (Любое)
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.entries.3.rows: Я никогда не подведу собратьев-повстанцев. Они — единственные друзья, что у меня остались.
Во время побега из города я разлучился с близким человеком. Я найду его.
Один из Слёз Злобы был моим верным другом, пока однажды не предал город. Он жестоко поплатится за свои прегрешения.
Дорогая мне вещь — последнее, что связывает меня с семьёй, которую я потерял во время падения города.
Дракон, отнявший у меня прежнюю жизнь, в полной мере испытает мою месть.
Знания в Библиотеке Мантора — незаменимое сокровище, которое нужно защищать.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.entries.4.rows: Я не уважаю тех, кто бежит. Я затаил глубокую обиду на горожан, что бросили Флан.
Эль — единственный способ забыть об отчаянности моего положения.
Быть повстанцем — значит порой поступать не вполне честно. Я всё ещё учусь с этим жить.
Моё желание освободить Флан часто затмевает мне рассудок, как бы я ни старался этого избежать.
Я неотступно презираю Увечную Злобу и его союзников. Я брошу любые другие цели, лишь бы нанести по ним удар.
Phlan Insurgent.entries.5.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Phlan Insurgent.name: Фланский повстанец
Phlan Refugee.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Phlan Refugee.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Phlan Refugee.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Phlan Refugee.entries.0.items.3.entry: Один набор {@filter инструментов ремесленника|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools} (на ваш выбор), памятка о жизни, которую вы некогда знали, комплект {@item traveler's clothes|phb|дорожной одежды} и поясной {@item pouch|phb|кошель} с 15 зм
Phlan Refugee.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Phlan Refugee.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Phlan Refugee.entries.2.entries.0: Миновали счастливые деньки, когда после тяжёлого трудового дня можно было заглянуть в трактир «Смеющийся гоблин». Всё изменилось, и вам повезло остаться в живых. Там, во Флане, вы могли причислить себя к ушлым обитателям улиц, что знали, когда сунуть взятку и с кем вести дела, чтобы прокормиться. Ваше умение чуять ветер перемен спасало вас и прежде, а на этот раз позволило стать одним из тех немногих счастливцев, кто покинул Флан не с пустыми руками.
Phlan Refugee.entries.2.name: Обзор
Phlan Refugee.entries.3.entries.0: Каким бы ни было ваше прежнее положение, теперь вы — один из множества беженцев, прибывших в Мулмастер. Вы можете найти приют у других выходцев из Флана и у тех, кто сочувствует вашей беде. В Мулмастере это означает, что вы можете отыскать место, где переночевать, прийти в себя и укрыться от стражи — либо у других беженцев из Флана, либо у Жентов в гетто. Примечание: это умение — вариант умения предыстории «Народный герой».
Phlan Refugee.entries.3.name: Умение: Выживший из Флана
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.0: Пусть я и потерял всё, ради чего трудился большую часть жизни, но дел невпроворот, и нет времени горевать о прошлом.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.1: Я упорно трудился, чтобы добиться нынешнего положения, и не позволю каким-то невзгодам помешать мне преуспеть.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.2: Я защищаю тех, кто рядом, — никогда не знаешь, кто из них пригодится.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.3: Я всегда добивался своего щедростью — зачем что-то менять теперь?
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.4: Я готовлюсь ко всему; во Флане это окупилось, окупится и впредь.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.5: Я верну свой дом; пусть путь будет долгим, я никогда не оставлю надежды.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.6: Я никогда не заботился о личной гигиене и поражаюсь, что это беспокоит других.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.0.rows.7: Я всегда рад предложить свои услуги — лишь бы при этом ничего не пришлось делать.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.0: Справедливость. Флан погубила коррупция, и я больше не намерен её терпеть. (Законопослушное)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.1: Смирение. Стабильность — миф, а вера в то, что можно управлять своим будущим, тщетна. (Хаотичное)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.2: Надежда. Мной руководит высшая сила, и я верю, что в конце концов всё будет хорошо. (Доброе)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.3: Сдержанность. Я ненавижу тех, кто причинил мне утрату. Мне стоит огромных усилий не наброситься на них. (Любое)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.4: Сила. Как показал Флан, выживают сильные. Если ты слаб — поделом тебе. (Злое)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.1.rows.5: Открытость. Я всегда готов поведать историю своей жизни любому, кто станет слушать. (Любое)
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.0: У меня есть шанс на новую жизнь, и на этот раз я всё сделаю правильно.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.1: Лорд-регент навлёк эти страдания на свой народ. Я добьюсь, чтобы его отдали под суд.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.2: Я жду дня, когда смогу вернуться в свой дом во Флане.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.3: Я никогда не забуду о долге перед Глевитом из Привечающих. Когда придёт время, я буду готов его вернуть.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.4: Во Флане у меня был дорогой мне человек; я узнаю, что с ним случилось.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.2.rows.5: Кое-кто говорит, что мою жизнь не стоило спасать; я докажу, что они ошибаются.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.0: Ради своего побега из Флана я пожертвовал жизнями детей.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.1: Я питаю слабость к неудачникам и всегда ставлю на проигрывающую сторону.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.2: Я не способен постоять за себя.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.3: Я беру у друзей деньги в долг, не собираясь их возвращать.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.4: Я не умею хранить секреты. Секрет — это просто ещё не рассказанная история.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.entries.3.rows.5: Когда что-то идёт не так, виноват кто угодно, только не я.
Phlan Refugee.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Phlan Refugee.name: Беженец из Флана

Physician.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Dagger|XPHB|кинжал} (скальпель), {@item Healer's Kit|XPHB|набор целителя}, {@item Herbalism Kit|XPHB|набор травника}, бинты, сборник снадобий, банка пиявок, {@item Robe|XPHB|мантия}, 10 зм; или (Б) 50 зм

Physician.name: Лекарь
Pioneer.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Pioneer.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Pioneer.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Pioneer.entries.0.items.3.entry: {@item Carpenter's Tools|XPHB|инструменты плотника} или {@item Mason's Tools|XPHB|инструменты каменщика}
Pioneer.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Pioneer.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Dagger|XPHB|кинжал}, {@item Carpenter's Tools|XPHB|инструменты плотника} или {@item Mason's Tools|XPHB|инструменты каменщика} (те же, что выше), мул и повозка, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB|дорожная одежда}, 8 зм; или (Б) 50 зм
Pioneer.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:

Plaintiff.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Plaintiff.entries.1.entries.0: Опыт общения с местной правовой системой дал вам твёрдое знание всех её тонкостей. Даже когда закон не на вашей стороне, вы можете сыпать заумными выражениями вроде ex injuria jus non oritur и cogitationis poenam nemo patitur, чтобы внушить людям, будто вы знаете, о чём говорите. С простыми людьми, что не разбираются в подобном, вы можете прибегнуть к запугиванию или обману, чтобы добиться поблажек или особого отношения.
Plaintiff.entries.1.name: Умение: Юридический жаргон
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.0: Истцы бывают самые разные. Одни — невинные очевидцы, которым нужна лишь справедливая компенсация за полученный ущерб. Другие — профессиональные дельцы зала суда, готовые на любые ухищрения, чтобы прикинуться пострадавшими ради крупной выплаты.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.0.1: Поверить не могу, что у меня есть шанс вступить в Acquisitions Incorporated! Сколько же меня ждёт веселья!
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1.1: Меня обижали всю мою жизнь, и мир передо мной в долгу.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.2.1: Я всегда старался извлечь лучшее из скверного положения.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.3.1: Закон не защищает честных и трудолюбивых. Я сделаю всё, что потребуется, чтобы восстановить справедливость.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.4.1: I'm always in the wrong place at the wrong time.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.5.1: My superiors are smarter and wiser than I am. I do what I'm told.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.6.1: Never pass up the opportunity to make an easy bit of coin. That's my motto.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.1.rows.7.1: I'm beginning to feel like the gods are not on my side.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.0.1: Justice. Those who break the law need to answer for their crimes. (Lawful)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.1.1: Freedom. People must have the freedom to do what they want and pursue their dreams. (Chaotic)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.2.1: Greed. Everyone I see is getting theirs, so I'm surely going to get mine. (Evil)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.3.1: Chaos. You're out of order! And you're out of order! This whole realm is out of order! (Chaotic)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.4.1: Humility. I'm just a small part of a larger whole. So is everyone else. (Neutral)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.2.rows.5.1: Responsibility. We all have our roles to play. I'll hold up my end of the bargain. (Any)
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.0.1: Others hurt in the same accident that hurt me are my new family. I'll make sure they're taken care of.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.1.1: The rulers of this place were kind to me, and they have my lifelong devotion.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.2.1: My parents worry about me, but I'll make them proud.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.3.1: The only bond that matters is the one holding my money pouch to my belt.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.4.1: The other new hires at Acquisitions Incorporated are my allies. We have each other's backs.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.3.rows.5.1: My legal counsel is my best friend. I owe all my forthcoming opportunities to their hard work.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.0.1: The person who gains the most reward for the least effort wins.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.1.1: Three magic beans for just one cow? What a deal!
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.2.1: I have only one vice, but it controls my life.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.3.1: Sleep is for the weak. We need to keep training more if we're going to be ready for the challenges ahead.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.4.1: Until my songs are sung in every tavern in this realm, I won't be satisfied.
Plaintiff.entries.2.entries.4.rows.5.1: If people find me unpleasant, that's their problem.
Plaintiff.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Plaintiff.name: Plaintiff
Planar Philosopher.entries.0.items.0.ent: {@skill Arcana}, the skill associated with your faction (see the Sigil Faction Affinities table) or one skill of your choice
Planar Philosopher.entries.0.items.2.ent: A portal key (such as a bag of golden tea leaves or the tooth of a planar beast), a manifesto of your guiding philosophy, a set of {@item common clothes|PHB} in your faction's style, and a {@item pouch|PHB} containing 10 gp worth of coins from different worlds and planes
Planar Philosopher.entries.1.caption: Sigil Faction Affinities
Planar Philosopher.entries.2.entries.0: Twelve factions have risen to prominence in the City of Doors, though many more exist. Your character might belong to one of these groups or another ideological faction, perhaps one of your own creation.
Planar Philosopher.entries.2.entries.1: The primary factions of Sigil, which are further detailed in chapter 2, adhere to the following philosophies:
Planar Philosopher.entries.2.entries.2.i: Deities are frauds and merely channel the might of a true, higher power.
Athar
There is no greater truth to the multiverse. Each being must discover their own meaning.
Bleak Cabal
Sensation is the proof of existence. By experiencing everything, we can understand the multiverse in all its complexity.
Society of Sensation
Thought clouds action. To fall in step with the multiverse, one must act on instinct alone.
Transcendent Order
Nothing lasts forever. The purpose of everything is to crumble and decay.
Doomguard
Everyone makes their own fate and is entitled to whatever they can take and hold.
Fated
All of existence is governed by laws, and power comes from understanding and exploiting them.
Fraternity of Order
Those who try to impose a single order on the multiverse are doomed to fail.
Hands of Havoc
The multiverse will be perfect only when everything is acting in harmony, whether it wants to or not.
Harmonium
Everyone is already dead; the entirety of the multiverse is an afterlife. Undeath holds the key to the next stage of existence.
Heralds of Dust
Cold, relentless justice is absolute, and no one is above it.
Mercykillers
The multiverse exists to be explored. It shapes us, and we shape it in turn.
Mind's Eye
Planar Philosopher.entries.2.name: Factions of Sigil
Planar Philosopher.entries.3.entries.0: You gain the {@feat Scion of the Outer Planes|SatO} feat. In addition, members of your organization provide you free, modest lodging and food at any of their holdings or the homes of other faction members.
Planar Philosopher.entries.3.name: Feature: Conviction
Planar Philosopher.entries.4.entries.0: Adventurers who dedicate themselves to a particular philosophy regarding the multiverse are welcomed among factions that embrace those beliefs. The Planar Philosopher Personality Traits table suggests various traits you might adopt for your character.
Planar Philosopher.entries.4.entries.1.r: I don't venerate any gods. With time, we can be as powerful as them or greater.
Experience is everything; live in the moment.
When things crumble, I find meaning in the dust.
Life thrives through order, and I seek to maintain that order.
When others make plans, the multiverse laughs and so do I.
I know what's right, and none will stand in my way.
Planar Philosopher.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Planar Philosopher.entries.5.entries.0: Some groups of planar philosophers might prefer certain types of characters, but by and large any character who upholds and furthers the beliefs of such a group is welcome within its ranks.
Planar Philosopher.entries.5.entries.1.e: When you make your character, you can roll once on the {@item Planar Philosopher Trinket|SatO|Planar Philosopher Trinkets} table, instead of on the {@item Trinket|PHB|Trinkets} table in the Player's Handbook, for your starting trinket.
Planar Philosopher.entries.5.name: Building a Planar Philosopher Character
Planar Philosopher.fluff.0: You subscribe to a philosophy that seeks to understand the nature of the planes or some hidden truth of the multiverse. You draw strength from your conviction and, perhaps, a network of like-minded thinkers, such as the factions of Sigil (summarized below). In your travels, you explore the depths of your understanding and spread your philosophy wherever you go.
Planar Philosopher.name: Planar Philosopher

Prismari Student.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Prismari Student.entries.0.items.1.entry: One type of {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument} or {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools}
Prismari Student.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Prismari Student.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Prismari Student.entries.0.items.3.entry: A {@item Ink (1-ounce bottle)|PHB|bottle of black ink}, an {@item ink pen|PHB}, a set of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools} or a {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument} (one of your choice), a school uniform, and a {@item pouch|phb} containing 10 gp
Prismari Student.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Prismari Student.entries.1.entries.0: You gain the {@feat Strixhaven Initiate|SCC} feat and must choose Prismari within it.
Prismari Student.entries.1.entries.1: In addition, if you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature, the spells on the Prismari Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
Prismari Student.entries.1.entries.2.row: {@spell Freedom of Movement}, {@spell Wall of Fire}
Prismari Student.entries.1.entries.3: Consider customizing how your spells look when you cast them. You might wield your Prismari spells with dynamic, gestural movement—as much dance as somatic component. Even a blast of fire in your hands is a sculpted work of art; elemental forces make grand designs as you hurl spells. These forces might linger on your body or in your clothes as decorative elements after your spells are dissipated, as sparks dance in your hair and your touch leaves tracings of frost on whatever you touch.
Prismari Student.entries.1.name: Feature: Prismari Initiate
Prismari Student.entries.2.entries.0: Any class or subclass that wields elemental forces of cold, fire, lightning, and wind can be a good fit in Prismari. Druids and sorcerers are common in Prismari, and wizards who study the Schools of {@class Wizard|PHB|Evocation|Evocation|PHB} or {@class Wizard|PHB|Transmutation|Transmutation|PHB} are also well represented. Clerics aren't very common in this school, but some with the {@class Cleric|PHB|Tempest domain|Tempest|PHB} end up here.
Prismari Student.entries.2.entries.1: Beyond the ranks of traditional spellcasters, Prismari students also include monks who follow the {@class Monk|PHB|Way of the Four Elements|Four Elements|PHB}. Some acrobatic rogues and fighters (including those who emulate the archetype of the {@class Fighter|PHB|Eldritch Knight|Eldritch Knight|PHB}) also delight in the athleticism of Prismari performance.
Prismari Student.entries.2.entries.2.ent: Though the curriculum of Prismari College attracts many outgoing and driven artists, the school has no shortage of shy scholars and lackadaisical blowhards among its ranks. The Prismari Personality Traits table suggests a variety of traits you might adopt for your character.
I'm the life of the party, and I expect everyone's attention when I walk into a room.
Two weeks ago, I was enthralled with my latest project. Now, I think it's garbage and deserves to be destroyed.
I believe everyone has the ability to express their truest selves through art, and I'm happy to quietly push them in the right direction.
Everyone is a critic, and I work to win them all over.
I'm beset with such an overwhelming sense of ennui regarding my art. Nothing quite captures my attention anymore.
Instead of confronting my negative emotions, I channel them into explosive artistic displays.
Prismari Student.entries.2.entries.3.ent: When you make your character, you may roll once on the {@item Prismari Trinket|SCC|Prismari Trinkets} table, instead of on the {@item trinket|phb|Trinkets table} in the {@book Player's Handbook|PHB}, for your starting trinket.
Prismari Student.entries.2.name: Building a Prismari Character
Prismari Student.fluff.0: You are an artist, and you have been preparing to hone your craft according to the traditions of Prismari College. Whatever your medium—sculpture, dance, paint, music, drama, architecture, or any other field—you have grand visions of bringing your art to life in a fusion of magic and creativity.
Prismari Student.name: Prismari Student

Prisoner.name: Prisoner
Purple Dragon Squire.entries.0.items.4.e: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Spear|XPHB}, {@item Navigator's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 9 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Purple Dragon Squire.fluff.0: You've pledged your life to the safety of Cormyr and sought admission to that realm's order of elite warriors: the Purple Dragon Knights. But before you have the chance to join the ranks officially, you must first serve as a knight's squire. You've found a liege willing to take you on and teach you the order's ways. Will you uphold the Purple Dragon Knights' ideals of glory, honor, and strength and prove yourself worthy of knighthood?
Purple Dragon Squire.name: Purple Dragon Squire
Quandrix Student.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Quandrix Student.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Quandrix Student.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Quandrix Student.entries.0.items.3.entry: A {@item Ink (1-ounce bottle)|PHB|bottle of black ink}, an {@item ink pen|PHB}, an {@item abacus|PHB}, a book of arcane theory, a school uniform, and a {@item pouch|phb} containing 15 gp
Quandrix Student.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Quandrix Student.entries.1.entries.0: You gain the {@feat Strixhaven Initiate|SCC} feat and must choose Quandrix within it.
Quandrix Student.entries.1.entries.1: In addition, if you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature, the spells on the Quandrix Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
Quandrix Student.entries.1.entries.3: Consider customizing how your spells look when you cast them. Your Quandrix spells might manifest amid kaleidoscopic swirls of fractal patterns, amplifying the tiniest movements of your somatic components. When your magic creates or alters creatures, it might briefly surround the targets with shimmering fractal designs or tessellated patterns.
Quandrix Student.entries.1.name: Feature: Quandrix Initiate
Quandrix Student.entries.2.entries.0: Any spellcasting class or subclass can work well for a Quandrix character. Both the scholarly focus of wizards (especially those who study the Schools of {@class Wizard|PHB|Abjuration|Abjuration|PHB}, {@class Wizard|PHB|Illusion|Illusion|PHB}, or {@class Wizard|PHB|Transmutation|Transmutation|PHB}) and the metamagic manipulations of sorcerers are welcome in Quandrix, and many druids explore the patterns of nature in Quandrix as well. A few clerics, particularly those with the {@class Cleric|PHB|Knowledge|Knowledge|PHB} or {@class Cleric|PHB|Nature|Nature|PHB} domains, study in Quandrix as well.
Quandrix Student.entries.2.entries.1: Aside from traditional spellcasters, a few characters of other classes find homes in Quandrix. Some fighters, monks, rangers, and rogues study here, using Quandrix principles to train their minds.
Quandrix Student.entries.2.entries.2.ent: With subjects ranging from the physical and tangible to the paradoxical and strange, the student body of Quandrix College includes an eclectic mix of individuals. The Quandrix Personality Traits table suggests a variety of traits you might adopt for your character.
When I find a subject I'm interested in, I won't stop studying until I know everything about it. It keeps me up at night.
I hope this all makes sense to me one day. Until then, I'm going to keep faking it.
Equations and patterns come naturally to my mind. I wish friendship came just as easily.
I believe I'm always the smartest person in the room. And I'll prove it, even if no one asks me to.
If these classes have taught me anything, it's that reality is a lie, and nothing matters. So why bother?
Before I graduate, I want to achieve something mathematically impossible. I must leave a legacy!
Quandrix Student.entries.2.entries.3.ent: When you make your character, you may roll once on the {@item Quandrix Trinket|SCC|Quandrix Trinkets} table, instead of on the {@item trinket|phb|Trinkets table} in the {@book Player's Handbook|PHB}, for your starting trinket.
Quandrix Student.entries.2.name: Building a Quandrix Character
Quandrix Student.fluff.0: In preparation to become a student of Quandrix College, you have spent years working through the college's math problems for prospective students. Your interests concentrate on the mathematical principles and patterns found in the natural world. You might lean more toward mathematics or physics, or you delve into more abstract studies of metaphysics, arcana, or logic.
Quandrix Student.name: Quandrix Student
Rakdos Cultist.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Rakdos Cultist.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Rakdos Cultist.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Rakdos Cultist.entries.0.items.3.entry: A Rakdos insignia, a {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument} (one of your choice), a {@item costume clothes|phb|costume}, a {@item hooded lantern|phb} made of wrought iron, a 10-foot length of chain with sharply spiked links, a {@item tinderbox|phb}, 10 {@item torch|phb|torches}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 10 gp (a mix of Azorius and Boros 1-zino coins), and a bottle of sweet, red juice
Rakdos Cultist.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Rakdos Cultist.entries.1.entries.0: Rakdos performance styles typically fuse standard circus-style acrobatics with fire, wrought-iron spikes and hooks, and monsters. You can roll a {@dice d8} or choose from the options in the Performance Options table to determine your preferred style of performance.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.1.name: A Flair for the Dramatic
Rakdos Cultist.entries.2.entries.0: People recognize you as a member of the Cult of Rakdos, and they're careful not to draw your anger or ridicule. You can get away with minor criminal offenses, such as refusing to pay for food at a restaurant or breaking down a door at a local shop, if no legal authorities witness the crime. Most people are too daunted by you to report your wrongdoing to the Azorius.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.2.name: Feature: Fearsome Reputation
Rakdos Cultist.entries.3.entries.0: {@i Требование: Использование заклинаний или Магия договора}
Rakdos Cultist.entries.3.entries.1: For you, the spells on the Rakdos Guild Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
{@spell burning hands}, {@spell dissonant whispers}, {@spell hellish rebuke}
{@spell crown of madness}, {@spell enthrall}, {@spell flaming sphere}
Rakdos Cultist.entries.3.entries.3: Your magic often produces a flashy spectacle, wreathing you or your targets in a mixture of harmless flame and shadowy shapes. When you manipulate an opponent's mind, a flaming symbol of Rakdos might momentarily appear like a mask over the target's face.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.3.name: Rakdos Guild Spells
Rakdos Cultist.entries.4.entries.0: Members of demonic cults aren't generally known as the kindest or most mentally stable individuals, so you're likely to have something in your nature that distinguishes you from the law-abiding citizens of Ravnica.
I revel in mayhem, the more destructive the better.
When violence breaks out, I lose myself in rage, and it's sometimes hard to stop.
Everything is funny to me, and the most hilarious and bloodiest things leave me cackling with sadistic glee.
I derive genuine pleasure from the pain of others.
I enjoy testing other people's patience.
I can't stand it when things are predictable, so I like to add a little chaos to every situation.
I throw my weight around to make sure I get my way.
I enjoy breaking delicate works of art. And fingers, which are sort of the same.
{@b Гильдия}. Только моя гильдия и важна по-настоящему. (Любое)
{@b Hedonism}. Death comes for everyone, so take as much pleasure as you can from every moment of life. (Neutral)
{@b Creativity}. I strive to find more ways to express my art through pain—my own as well as others'. (Chaotic)
{@b Freedom}. No one tells me what to do. (Chaotic)
{@b Equality}. I want to see Ravnica remade, with no guilds and no hierarchies. (Chaotic)
{@b Spectacle}. People are inspired by the greatness they see in art. (Any)
I have belonged to the same performance troupe for years, and these people mean everything to me.
A blood witch told me I have a special destiny to fulfill, and I'm trying to figure out what it is.
I'm secretly hoping that I can change the cult from the inside, using my influence to help rein in the wanton violence.
I own something that Rakdos once touched (it's seared black at the spot), and I cherish it.
I want to be better at my chosen form of performance than any other member of my troupe.
I am devoted to Rakdos and live to impress him.
My family is prominent in another guild. I enjoy my wild life, but I don't want to embarrass them.
I couldn't hide my emotions and opinions even if I wanted to.
I throw caution to the wind.
I resent the rich and powerful.
When I'm angry, I lash out in violence.
There's no such thing as too much pleasure.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Rakdos Cultist.entries.5.entries.0: The Cult of Rakdos is anything but organized. Individuals frequently move from one performance troupe to another. Almost all members of the cult know former castmates now in different troupes, which allows for the possibility of a widespread network of contacts.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.5.entries.1: Roll twice on the Rakdos Contacts table (for an ally and a rival) and once on the Non-Rakdos Contacts table.
I was part of a two-person act until my former partner moved to a different troupe.
My sibling and I ran away from home and joined the Cult of Rakdos together. We're very close.
A childhood friend of mine is an attendant in Rix Maadi, the Rakdos guildhall.
My parents brought me into the guild and taught me my trade.
There's a lesser demon in the cult who thinks he owes me a favor, and who am I to argue?
The master of ceremonies in my troupe is well connected with other troupes.
I had a romance with a pain artist in another troupe.
Rakdos himself has witnessed me perform.
I know an Azorius elocutor who has a very amusing dark side.
A Boros captain really wants to "redeem" me.
I think a member of my troupe is a Dimir agent.
I once convinced a Golgari medusa to participate in a show. We've been on good terms ever since.
I came from the Gruul and still have relatives there.
An Izzet technician provides pyrotechnics for my performances.
An Orzhov oligarch has taken an interest in my career, like a patron of the arts.
Roll an additional Rakdos contact; you can decide if the contact is an ally or a rival.
A Selesnya healer attends my performances regularly.
A Simic biomancer provides mutant monsters to add a taste of the bizarre to our shows.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.5.name: Контакты
Rakdos Cultist.entries.6.entries.0: The Cult of Rakdos encourages independent action on the part of its members. Its goal is fomenting chaos, and it firmly believes in putting its own house in disorder before carrying that mission into the larger city. So your role is to execute your vision of grand satire and disruptive performance art, as you aspire to outdo your guild mates and attract the attention of Rakdos himself.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.6.entries.1: You work as part of a troupe, with your artistic talents used in service to a ringmaster's vision. But your performance is your own, and no one expects you to follow a script. In fact, if you go through a performance without doing something you haven't done before, you're clearly not trying hard enough.
Rakdos Cultist.entries.6.name: Какова моя роль?
Rakdos Cultist.name: Rakdos Cultist
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Cartographer's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Backpack|XPHB}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB}, {@item Hooded Lantern|XPHB}, {@item Oil|XPHB} (3 flasks), {@item Rope|XPHB}, {@item Tinderbox|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Waterskin|XPHB}, 23 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Rashemi Wanderer.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Rashemi Wanderer.fluff.0: You spent years wandering the highlands of Rashemen, a dangerous windswept heath that's dotted with ancient obelisks enchanted to imprison Fiends and home to dragons, gnolls, and other deadly creatures. Friendships are hard to find in such an isolated land, and you've learned to keep strangers at a distance.
Rashemi Wanderer.name: Rashemi Wanderer
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Dagger|XPHB}, {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB}, Bag of Trinkets from Travels, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Released Thrall.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Released Thrall.name: Released Thrall
Revelry Pirate (Sailor).name: Revelry Pirate (Sailor)
Rewarded.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Rewarded.entries.0.items.1.name: Языки:
Rewarded.entries.0.items.2.entry: A bottle of black ink, an {@item ink pen|PHB}, five sheets of paper, a {@item gaming set|PHB} (matching your chosen proficiency), a {@item signet ring|PHB}, a set of {@item fine clothes|PHB}, and a {@item pouch|PHB} containing 18 gp
Rewarded.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Rewarded.entries.0.items.3.entries.0: One {@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set} of your choice (such as {@item playing card set|phb|playing cards} or {@item three-dragon ante set|phb|three-dragon ante cards})
Rewarded.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Rewarded.entries.1.entries.0: Your unexpected good fortune is reflected by a minor boon. You gain the {@feat Lucky}, {@feat Magic Initiate}, or {@feat Skilled} feat (your choice). Your choice of feat reflects the transformation that changed your life. An encounter with a genie who gave you three wishes might have resulted in magical powers represented by Magic Initiate. If you paid off all your family debts with a fortuitous round of three-dragon ante, you might be Lucky instead. Alternatively, you could use the Skilled feat to reflect whatever trial you endured to secure your new destiny and to model the knowledge and abilities imparted to you by whatever force transformed your life.
Rewarded.entries.1.name: Feature: Fortune's Favor
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.0: Your character's perspective on life has changed thanks to their new destiny. The Rewarded Personality Traits table suggests traits you might adopt for your character and cards from the {@item Deck of Many Things} that might have prompted this trait.
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.0.1: A safe home is a foundation on which anything else can be built. (Key, Throne)
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1.1: I was elevated to heights I could never otherwise attain, and I won't waste my fortune. (Star, Sun)
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.2.1: I try to be a source of inspiration and joy to others. Life is never as bad as you think! (Euryale, Jester)
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.3.1: Courage and boldness can carry the day when all else fails. (Comet, Knight)
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.4.1: My good fortune means I can lift others up as well. (Gem, Moon)
Rewarded.entries.2.entries.1.rows.5.1: Having the right answers is the first step to solving any problem, no matter how dire. (Fates, Sage)
Rewarded.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Rewarded.entries.3.entries.0: Rewarded characters have varied histories, but they have one thing in common: they were down on their luck before their lives abruptly turned around. They might have given up all hope of a happier life, only to suddenly get a second chance. A rewarded character has often spent many years struggling to escape painful circumstances. Now, extricated from the (sometimes literal) prison that was their former life, they throw their cares to the wind and become adventurers.
Rewarded.entries.3.entries.1: If your character's life was changed by a {@item Deck of Many Things}, consider which card was responsible. Perhaps the Fates card undid a tragic mistake your character made in their youth. The Gem card could have wiped out debts incurred over a lifetime. Maybe the Sage card provided the advice needed to escape a hopeless situation, the Star card increased an ability score to its current value, or a {@spell Wish} spell cast after drawing the Moon card transformed your character from a peddler to a fledgling sorcerer infused with magic and new knowledge and skills. If you're making a character at higher than 1st level, magic items they have could have been granted by the Key or Sun card.
Rewarded.entries.3.name: Building a Rewarded Character
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.0: When you make your character, you can roll once on the Rewarded Trinkets table instead of on the Trinkets table in the {@book Player's Handbook|PHB} for your starting trinket.
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.0.1: A perfumed silk scarf from an admirer
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.1.1: A crystal bead that glows like a candle in the dark
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.2.1: A letter of introduction and invitation from an influential person in a far-off city
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.3.1: A motto or symbol whose meaning eludes you, etched on a piece of your equipment
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.4.1: A crisp playing card that never seems to tear or soil, depicting the card that affected you
Rewarded.entries.4.entries.1.rows.5.1: Half a medallion designed to be rejoined to its other half
Rewarded.entries.4.name: Rewarded Trinkets
Rewarded.fluff.0: You were living a difficult life before your destiny suddenly changed through a miraculous turn of good fortune. Perhaps a benevolent deity gave you precisely what you most desired. You might have stumbled across a Deck of Many Things and drawn a card with a potent, positive effect. Or maybe you inherited a modest fortune from a distant relative you didn't know you had.
Rewarded.fluff.1: Regardless, you left the daily miseries of your old life behind in favor of a life of adventure and excitement. Your old debts have been paid, responsibilities you thought inescapable are behind you, or you suddenly possess rare and unusual skills unknown to ordinary folk.
Rewarded.name: Rewarded
Rival Intern.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Rival Intern.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Rival Intern.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Rival Intern.entries.0.items.3.entry: One set of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools}, a ledger from your previous employer containing a small piece of useful information, a set of {@item fine clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 10 gp
Rival Intern.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Rival Intern.entries.1.entries.0: You have connections to your previous employer or other groups you dealt with during your previous employment. You can communicate with your contacts, gaining information at the DM's discretion.
Rival Intern.entries.1.name: Feature: Inside Informant
Rival Intern.entries.2.entries.0: If you were happy with your previous internship, the parting of ways might have been amicable. If not, it might have involved armed guards removing you from the premises. If you were passed over at your previous position, it might have left you a blend of seething rage, practiced nonchalance, and keen knowledge of where the bodies are buried (perhaps literally).
My previous employer didn't respect me, and now I'll do whatever I can to gain respect.
The job is important, but the relationships I forge with my coworkers are even more so.
The job is everything to me. Who needs relaxation, hobbies, and a social life?
I know I'm not the best and brightest, but if I put my best self forward, I can overcome anything.
My former boss was an idiot. So was my boss before that. And before that. I'm sure those were all coincidences.
This company is so much better than my previous one. It will always be the best until they stop paying me.
I know this dagger belongs to the company, but I'm sure they won't miss it. Or this flask. Or this armor.
It's only a matter of time before I'll be upper management. I just have to kiss up to my superiors and kick down those beneath me.
Advancement. Money and power can be gained more easily within an organization. I plan to gain as much as possible. (Evil)
Structure. Life goes much more smoothly when you follow the rules and work within a system. (Lawful)
Uncertainty. The more chaos that swirls around me, the more opportunities I can find to profit. (Chaotic)
Justice. I can't stand people being treated unjustly. I do whatever it takes to stop injustice and those who flout the law. (Lawful)
Pleasure. What's the use of working hard and making money if you can't enjoy the finer things in life? (Any)
Power. Money is fine, but real power means never having to say you're sorry. (Evil)
I have a family member in need. I consider them in everything I do.
My past mistakes cost someone else dearly. I have to rectify that.
A childhood mentor put me on my current path. If I succeed, I want to repay that mentor in some way.
I value an oath of loyalty I took to a group of friends over everything else in my life.
Although I don't get along well with people, my pet means the world to me.
I know what's best. Trust me.
Flaw? I have no flaws. I'm perfect.
If anything goes wrong, it must be someone else's fault. Let me explain that in detail.
There's right and there's wrong, and there's no gray area in between.
Our superiors might not like what you're doing. I'm going to have to put that in my report.
Rival Intern.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Rival Intern.name: Rival Intern
Ruined.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Ruined.entries.0.items.1.name: Языки:
Ruined.entries.0.items.2.entry: A cracked {@item hourglass|PHB}, a set of rusty {@item manacles|PHB}, a half-empty bottle, a {@item hunting trap|PHB}, a {@item gaming set|PHB} (matching your chosen proficiency), a set of {@item traveler's clothes|PHB}, and a {@item pouch|PHB} containing 13 gp
Ruined.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Ruined.entries.0.items.3.entries.0: One {@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set} of your choice (such as playing cards or three-dragon ante cards)
Ruined.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Ruined.entries.1.entries.0: You have weathered ruinous misfortune, and you possess hidden reserves others don't expect. You gain the {@feat Alert}, {@feat Skilled}, or {@feat Tough} feat (your choice). Your choice of feat reflects how you've dealt with the terrible loss that changed your life forever. If you've kept your senses sharp for every opportunity and climbed your way out of misery by seizing the tiniest scrap of hope, choose Alert. If you've redoubled your efforts to reclaim what was once yours, choose Skilled. If you've stoically persevered through your misfortune, select Tough.
Ruined.entries.1.name: Feature: Still Standing
Ruined.entries.2.entries.0: Rising above misfortune shapes one's perspective. The Ruined Personality Traits table suggests traits you might adopt for your character (and ruinous cards that might have prompted this trait).
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.0.1: I've changed from my past, and I work to live up to my new path. (Balance, Throne)
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1.1: Every moment is a gift I refuse to squander. (Euryale, Skull)
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.2.1: Now that I've overcome having nothing, I can survive anything. (Fool, Ruin, Talons)
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.3.1: I know enemies are set against me, and I always prepare for the worst. (Flames, Rogue)
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.4.1: I interpret every event as part of a larger pattern I just haven't worked out yet. (Puzzle, Star)
Ruined.entries.2.entries.1.rows.5.1: I must make up for so much time I've already lost. (Donjon, Void)
Ruined.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Ruined.entries.3.entries.0: Ruined characters were on top of the world before misfortune struck. Many were wealthy. Others come from modest backgrounds, but they were surrounded by friends, family, and loved ones. They might have been famous, or simply never encountered serious hardship before. Some were born to privilege or rose to prominence through trickery or a false reputation. Now a {@item Deck of Many Things}—or another calamity—has knocked them down like a house of cards.
Ruined.entries.3.entries.1: If your character's life was ruined by a {@item Deck of Many Things}, consider which card was responsible. Perhaps your character was imprisoned for years by the Donjon or Void card, and now everyone they knew has died. Maybe your character drew the Rogue card, and the person closest to them—a spouse, child, or parent—turned against them. A devil unleashed by the Flames card might have destroyed their life. The Ruin or Talons card might have stolen the character's material goods or saddled them with vast debt.
Ruined.entries.3.name: Building a Ruined Character
Ruined.entries.4.entries.0: When you make your character, you can roll once on the Ruined Trinkets table instead of on the Trinkets table in the {@book Player's Handbook|PHB}.
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.0.1: A rusted scrap of a once-beloved family heirloom
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.1.1: A land deed, but all the names and markings that once tied it to you have faded into obscurity
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.2.1: A bauble once imbued with powerful magic
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.3.1: A battered playing card with a hole pierced in it, its face depicting the card that affected you
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.4.1: A yellowed Humanoid tooth that whispers eerily when placed under a pillow
Ruined.entries.4.entries.1.rows.5.1: A keepsake from someone you were once close to but who is now your enemy
Ruined.entries.4.name: Ruined Trinkets
Ruined.fluff.0: Everything was going so well! You had a life of luxury, love, and comfort when you suddenly lost it all. Perhaps you were framed for crimes you didn't commit and lost your reputation, fortune, and career. Maybe a rampaging dragon or another monster wiped out everything you had in a single calamitous afternoon. Or you might have sought out a Deck of Many Things, hoping to make your successful life even more glorious—only to draw a destructive card that changed your destiny forever.
Ruined.fluff.1: Your desperation has driven you to the career of adventurer. You don't seek out dark dungeons and their monstrous inhabitants for excitement and glory; you do it because every other path is closed to you. But you have risen high on fortune's wheel once before, and with luck and fortitude, you could do so again.
Ruined.name: Ruined
Rune Carver.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Rune Carver.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Rune Carver.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Rune Carver.entries.0.items.3.entry: A set of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools} (one of your choice), a small knife, a {@item whetstone|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, and a {@item pouch|phb} containing 10 gp
Rune Carver.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.0: Each rune carver has a unique style and preferred medium. To determine how you make your runes, you can roll on the Rune Style table.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.caption: Rune Style
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.0.1: You inscribe runes in wax or clay with a fine metal needle.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.1.1: You whittle pieces of wood into small figurines you mark with runes.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.2.1: You engrave runes onto glass beads and thread them onto necklaces and bracelets.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.3.1: You stitch runes into the hems of clothing.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.4.1: You carve runes on a set of animal bones you can throw in different formations.
Rune Carver.entries.1.entries.1.rows.5.1: You draw runes into candles, melting the wax to smooth over the engravings.
Rune Carver.entries.1.name: Rune Styles
Rune Carver.entries.2.entries.0: Scholarly pursuits, ancient mysteries, or a fateful encounter might inspire a character to pursue the secrets of a rune carver.
Rune Carver.entries.2.name: Building a Rune Carver Character
Rune Carver.entries.3.entries.0: You gain the {@feat Rune Shaper|BGG} feat.
Rune Carver.entries.3.name: Feature: Rune Shaper
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.0: The Rune Carver Personality Traits table suggests a variety of traits you might adopt for your character.
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.0.1: Is it practical to learn an ancient language that is rarely spoken? No. But is it fun? Very.
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.1.1: I learned one of my ancestors was a lauded rune carver whose story was lost to time. I seek to rekindle that legacy.
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.2.1: The old, traditional markings of runecraft look so boring. Why not give my runes some flair?
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.3.1: In my studies of runes, I strive to understand how great civilizations of the past fell, so I can prevent it from happening to societies of the present.
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.4.1: Life may be a whirlwind of chaos, but whenever I create my runes, I feel at peace.
Rune Carver.entries.4.entries.1.rows.5.1: My brain struggles to process words written in ink, but the feeling of carved runes makes my mind sing.
Rune Carver.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Rune Carver.fluff.1: You've dedicated your life to studying runecraft. Whether you were taught by a master rune carver or learned by poring over ancient engravings, you can tap into the supernatural power held within runes.
Rune Carver.fluff.2: The art of runecraft was initially created by giants, but over time, the practice has been adopted by many peoples. As such, though Giant runes are the most commonly used, many rune carvers incorporate symbols from their native languages into the craft.
Rune Carver.name: Rune Carver
Sage.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Sage.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Sage.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Sage.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Sage.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Quarterstaff|XPHB|Боевой посох}, {@item Calligrapher's Supplies|XPHB|Инструменты каллиграфа}, {@item Book|XPHB|Книга} (история), {@item Parchment|XPHB|Пергамент} (8 листов), {@item Robe|XPHB|Мантия}, 8 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Sage.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Sage.fluff.0: Вы провели свои юные годы, путешествуя между поместьями и монастырями, выполняя для них работу и оказывая услуги в обмен на доступ к их библиотекам. Вы провели много долгих вечеров за книгами и свитками; вы изучали знания о мультивселенной, и даже основы магии — и ваш разум жаждет большего.
Sage.name: Мудрец
Sailor.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Sailor.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Sailor.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Sailor.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Sailor.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Dagger|XPHB|Кинжал}, {@item Navigator's Tools|XPHB|Инструменты навигатора}, {@item Rope|XPHB|Верёвка}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB|Дорожная одежда}, 20 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Sailor.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Sailor.fluff.0: Вы жили на морских просторах, ветер дул вам в спину, и палуба покачивалась под вашими ногами. Вы сидели в большем количестве портовых баров, чем можете припомнить, проходили через сильные шторма и болтали с подводными обитателями.
Sailor.name: Моряк
Scion of the Thaumaturge.entries.0.items: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Cartographer's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Ink Pen|XPHB}, {@item Parchment|XPHB}, {@item Robe|XPHB}, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Scion of the Thaumaturge.name: Scion of the Thaumaturge
Scribe.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Scribe.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Scribe.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Scribe.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Scribe.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Calligrapher's Supplies|XPHB|Инструменты каллиграфа}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB|Отличная одежда}, {@item Lamp|XPHB|Лампа}, {@item Oil|XPHB|Масло} (3 фляги), {@item Parchment|XPHB|Пергамент} (12 листов), 23 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Scribe.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Scribe.fluff.0: Годы вашего становления прошли в скриптории, в государственном учреждении или в монастыре, посвященном сохранению знаний. Там вы научились писать чётким почерком, создавая тонко написанные тексты. Возможно, вы переписывали правительственные документы или копировали рукописные тома. Возможно, у вас есть некоторые навыки в написании поэзии, повествовании или научных исследованиях. Прежде всего вы уделяете внимание деталям, что помогает вам избегать ошибок в документах, которые вы копируете и создаёте.
Scribe.name: Писарь
Secret Identity.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Secret Identity.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Secret Identity.entries.0.items.2.entry: A {@item disguise kit|phb}, a {@item forgery kit|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, a belt {@item pouch|phb}, 5 gp
Secret Identity.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Secret Identity.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Secret Identity.entries.2.entries.0: Even though you are a non-human, despite Hillsfar's Great Law of Humanity, you continue to live in the City of Trade. You do so by maintaining a secret identity, forging documents, and wearing a disguise. Few, if any, know you aren't human. If you're a halfling or gnome, you pass as a little person or a child. If you're a half-elf, half-orc, or genasi, you disguise your non-human features. Other races use a combination of disguise and concealing clothing to hide. Your reasons for doing so are your own. Perhaps you're a dissident or the agent of a foreign power. Maybe you have a relationship with someone you cannot bear to leave. Regardless, this way of life has taken a heavy toll on you.
Secret Identity.entries.2.name: Обзор
Secret Identity.entries.3.entries.0: You have created a secret identity that you use to conceal your true race and that offers a covering explanation for your presence in Hillsfar. In addition, you can forge documents, including official papers and personal letters, as long as you have seen an example of the kind of document or the handwriting you are trying to copy Note: This feature is a variant of the Charlatan feature.
Secret Identity.entries.3.name: Feature: Secret Identity
Secret Identity.entries.4.entries.0.rows: Despite its problems, I love Hillsfar, it's the greatest city in the world. The only one for me.
I move from place to place, never staying anywhere long and leaving nothing behind.
I think flattery is the best way to direct attention away from me.
I don't make friends easily. They're a liability I cannot afford.
Risk and danger are exhilarate me. Pulling off schemes and deceptions is a rush.
The First Lord is right, humans are superior. I really admire them, despite the atrocities.
I avoid people of my own race, as well as things associated with my race, lest they give me away.
I live for the Arena. I admire gladiators and enjoy the thrill of blood on the sands!
Secret Identity.entries.4.entries.1.rows: Quisling. Supporting the rulers of the land and following the laws is the road to salvation. (Lawful)
Scoflaw. The laws and lawmakers are corrupt. I follow laws only when it suits me. (Chaotic)
Optimist. Everyone Is basically good. Though the government is misguided it will all be okay. (Any)
Secretive. I am in the habit of not talking about myself. My business is none of yours. (Any)
Heroic. I do everything I can to help non-humans, regardless of the personal cost to me. (Good)
Depraved. I have lost my moral compass. The ends justify most any means. (Evil)
Secret Identity.entries.4.entries.2.rows: The humans of Hillsfar have inflicted terrible harm on me, my family, and my race. I will have revenge.
I am part of an underground network that smuggles non-humans into and out of the city.
I am a partisan. I commit minor acts of defiance against the First Lord and Red Plumes when I can.
I am a spy. I report on events in and around Hillsfar.
My secret identity is the only thing protecting me from the Arena. I will stop at nothing to maintain it.
I am madly in love with a human who does not know my true identity, and I fear rejection if I reveal it.
Secret Identity.entries.4.entries.3.rows: After years of denying who I am, I now despise myself and other members of my pathetic race.
Years of hiding have made me somewhat paranoid. I trust no one.
I've been lying so often and for so long that I can't help it anymore. I frequently lie for no reason at all.
I am ashamed. I failed to protect a member of my family who was seized and thrown into the Area.
I am struggling with maintaining my secret identity. I subconsciously want to get caught and therefore sometimes let my secret identity slip.
Years of successfully deceiving others have made me cocky. I think no one can see through my lies.
Secret Identity.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Secret Identity.name: Secret Identity
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.1.entr: One type of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools} or one {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument}
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.2.entr: Choose one of Elvish, Loxodon, or Sylvan
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.3.entr: A Selesnya insignia, a {@item healer's kit|phb}, {@item robes|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 5 gp (Azorius 1-zino coins)
Selesnya Initiate.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Selesnya Initiate.entries.1.entries.0: As a member of the Selesnya Conclave, you can count on your guild mates to provide shelter and aid. You and your companions can find a place to hide or rest in any Selesnya enclave in the city, unless you have proven to be a danger to them. The members of the enclave will shield you from the law or anyone else searching for you, though they will not risk their lives in this effort.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.1.entries.1: In addition, as a guild member you can receive free healing and care at a Selesnya enclave, though you must provide any material components needed for spells.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.1.name: Feature: Conclave's Shelter
Selesnya Initiate.entries.2.entries.0: {@i Требование: Использование заклинаний или Магия договора}
Selesnya Initiate.entries.2.entries.1: For you, the spells on the Selesnya Guild Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
Selesnya Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.ro: {@spell aid}, {@spell animal messenger}, {@spell calm emotions}, {@spell warding bond}
{@spell aura of life}, {@spell conjure minor elementals}
Selesnya Initiate.entries.2.entries.3: Members of the Selesnya Conclave refer to their magic as "doruvati," a Sylvan word meaning "gift." When you use these gifts of Mat'Selesnya, graceful swirls of green and silver light dance in the air around you, and phantasmal green leaves might waft through the air. A sensation of gentle warmth and the smell of spring flowers or autumn leaves might accompany your spells.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.2.name: Selesnya Guild Spells
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.entries.0: Most members of the Selesnya Conclave are true believers—the tight-knit community allows little room for the cynical or disillusioned. They are spiritual, empathetic, and generally peaceful—unless roused to action. Their flaws and bonds alike grow naturally from their close ties to the community.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.entries.1.ro: I never raise my voice or lose my temper.
I feel the pains and joys of everyone around me, friend or foe.
I would rather make a friend than thwart an enemy.
I'm always straining to peer into another reality that seems to be just beyond my senses.
I'm uneasy if I can't see plants growing or feel soil beneath my feet.
Seeing illness or injury in any creature saddens me.
I have much to be proud of, but I am still just one strand in the grand, interwoven tapestry of life.
Nature offers rich and abundant metaphors for understanding the complexities of life.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.entries.2.ro: {@b Гильдия}. Только моя гильдия и важна по-настоящему. (Любое)
{@b Harmony}. Nothing is more beautiful than voices and actions aligned in common purpose. (Good)
{@b Order}. Like a well-pruned tree, society thrives when everything is kept in good order. (Lawful)
{@b Life}. Preserving life and nature is always a worthwhile endeavor. (Good)
{@b Humility}. Ambition and pride are the roots of strife. (Good)
{@b Evangelism}. When all have joined the Selesnya Conclave, Ravnica will finally know peace. (Any)
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.entries.3.ro: I would give my life in the defense of the small enclave where I first encountered Mat'Selesnya.
I love beasts and plants of all kinds, and am loath to harm them.
A healer nursed me to recovery from a mortal illness.
I'll sing the invitation of Mat'Selesnya with my dying breath.
I cherish a leaf from Vitu-Ghazi that changes color with the seasons, even though it is no longer attached to the tree.
Every member of the conclave is my kin, and I would fight for any one of them.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.entries.4.ro: I'm terrified of getting into a fight where my side is outnumbered.
I assume that people mean well until they prove otherwise.
I enjoy comfort and quiet, and prefer to avoid extra effort.
I have a fierce temper that doesn't reflect the inner calm I seek.
I'm convinced that everyone else in the conclave has a deeper connection to the Worldsoul than I do.
I'm trying to atone for the life of crime I led before I joined the Selesnya, but I find it hard to give up my bad habits.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Selesnya Initiate.entries.4.entries.0: The Selesnya Conclave is all about connections, so its members cultivate contacts throughout the guild. The guild also engages in energetic recruitment to draw converts from other guilds, and often these new guild members maintain friendships with former guild mates.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.4.entries.1: Roll twice on the Selesnya Contacts table (for an ally and a rival) and once on the Non-Selesnya Contacts table.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.4.entries.2.ro: A wise centaur trainer believed in me even though I was a terrible student.
A good friend has risen to become a Ledev guardian.
I left my former guild and joined the Selesnya along with a close friend.
The dryad at the head of my enclave has taken an interest in my activities.
A sibling is an instructor at the guild's training grounds.
One of my parents is a votary, tasked with protecting the temple gardens at the Vitu-Ghazi guildhall.
I had a romance with a well-known Selesnya healer.
Trostani, the head of the guild and the voice of Mat'Selesnya, once welcomed me into her presence.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.4.entries.3.ro: I left the Azorius, and a former colleague still resents me for that act.
A good friend, eager for action, left the Selesnya and joined the Boros.
I had a relationship with a guild mate who turned out to be a Dimir agent.
I know a disgruntled Golgari assassin who is ripe for recruitment.
I'm friendly with a Gruul centaur who almost joined us a few years back.
I once had a heated public argument with an Izzet chemister, and neither of us is allowed back into that restaurant.
I paid off my debt to the Orzhov Syndicate, but my good friend was not so lucky and remains indebted to that guild.
At a time of terrible grief in my life, a Rakdos performer made a mockery of my pain, leaving me with mixed feelings of sadness and humor.
Roll an additional Selesnya contact; you can decide if the contact is an ally or a rival.
I have a sibling in the Simic Combine, and we argue every time we see each other.
Selesnya Initiate.entries.4.name: Контакты
